title: British Columbia Progamme Monthly Trend Sheet - May 2025
content:
In May 2025, credit prices in BC LCFS remained stable month-on-month (MoM), going from $244.19 in April 2025 to $244.76- still well below the March's peak of $345.09.

Year-to-date credit volumes for 2025 have remained broadly in line with those of 2024 at about 688,890. However, May saw a notable uptick, with volumes rising from 27,696 in May 2024 to 116,301 in May 2025- though still well below the March 2025 peak of 456,388.

Historically, credit activity tends to peak in March likely driven by the March 31st compliance deadline, with subsequent months typically witnessing subdued activity.
author: Aru Somya
